title: ascyrum hypericoides var. oblongifolium
intro: Ascyrum hypericoides var. oblongifolium, also known as the rough-leaved woodruff or ascyrum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and rheumatism, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Ascyrum hypericoides var. oblongifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for many ailments.
